zh.lifeSummary: John Broughton是John De Broughton和Agnes Boteler的兒子，於1365年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓。他於1402年與Mary Peyvre結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1447年在他的家鄉享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Broughton是John De Broughton和Agnes Boteler的儿子，于1365年出生在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓。他于1402年与Mary Peyvre结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1447年在他的家乡享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Broughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England called Broughton. The first element is variously Old English brōc ‘brook’, burg ‘fortress’, or beorg ‘hill, mound’; the second is in all cases Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Braughton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Broughton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: John Broughton was born in 1365, in Preston, Lancashire, England as the son of John De Broughton and Agnes Boteler. He married Mary Peyvre in 1402. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1447, in his hometown, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: John Broughton est né en 1365, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de John De Broughton et Agnes Boteler. Il a épousé Mary Peyvre en 1402. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1447, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: John Broughton wurde 1365 in Preston, Lancashire, England, als Sohn von John De Broughton und Agnes Boteler geboren. Er hat 1402 Mary Peyvre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1447 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: John Broughton è nato il nel 1365 nel Preston, Lancashire, England come figlio di John De Broughton e Agnes Boteler. Lui sposato Mary Peyvre nel 1402. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1447, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Broughtonは1365年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでJohn De BroughtonとAgnes Botelerの息子として生まれた。1402年にMary Peyvreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1447年に故郷で82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Broughton(은)는 1365년 영국 랭카실르 플레스턴에서 John De Broughton(와)과 Agnes Boteler의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1402년 Mary Peyvre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1447년 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Broughton nasceu em 1365, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de John De Broughton e Agnes Boteler. Ele casou-se com Mary Peyvre em 1402. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1447, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Broughton родился в 1365 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия. Его родителей звали John De Broughton и Agnes Boteler. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Peyvre в 1402 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1447 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Broughton nació en 1365, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de John De Broughton y Agnes Boteler. Se casó con Mary Peyvre en 1402. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1447, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años.
